🚀 Big Launches.summary: OpenRouter has raised a $113 million Series B led by CapitalG, indicating the multi-AI-model future is here.

🚀 Big Launches.summary: UMG has pushed platforms to implement stricter content moderation policies.

🛠️ Builder's Toolbox.summary: A new method for generating physically buildable brick structures from 3D shapes.

🎯 Interview Edge.summary: Two novel frameworks for developing autonomous, agentic AI in scientific workflows.

🎯 Interview Edge.summary: A new benchmark for evaluating Theory of Mind in large language models.

⚖️ Responsible AI.summary: The Convention on Certain Conventional Weapons is addressing lethal autonomous systems.

⚖️ Responsible AI.summary: Uber is questioning the returns on its AI investments.

🔮 On the Horizon.summary: A study on whether large language models can detect and report their own internal states.

tool_of_day.title: BrickAnything: Geometry-Conditioned Buildable Brick Generation with Structure-Aware Tokenization
tool_of_day.summary: A new method for generating physically buildable brick structures from 3D shapes.

hot_take: The AI industry is shifting towards more responsible and transparent AI development, with a focus on agentic AI, theory of mind, and long-term agent memory.
